author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mairimashita! Iruma-kun 4th Season' Unveils Additional Cast, Second Promo
The official website of the Mairimashita! Iruma-kun 4th Season (Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 4) television anime unveiled an additional cast, a second key visual (pictured right), and second promotional video on Saturday. The anime series adapting Osamu Nishi's comedy fantasy manga premiered on April 4 at 6:25 p.m. on NHK-E. Cast Leviathan Leiji: Yuuma Uchida (Fruits Basket) Belial-Berry Razberry: Yoshitsugu Matsuoka (Sword Art Online) Gyari: Misato Matsuoka (Bad Girl) Music g...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Light Novel 'Class de 2-banme ni Kawaii Onnanoko to Tomodachi ni Natta' Concludes With 10th Volume
The official X (formerly Twitter) account for illustrator Azuri Hyuuga announced on Wednesday that Takata's Class de 2-banme ni Kawaii Onnanoko to Tomodachi ni Natta (I Became Friends with the Second Cutest Girl in the Class.) light novel series will end with its tenth volume. The final volume is scheduled to release on July 1. Takata began penning the romantic comedy series on the Kakuyomu website in November 2020. Kadokawa later acquired the series and began publishing the first volume un...
